views.markdown: If you need help with "Cydia", you can contact Bonnie Anderson, the developer, via e-mail.
You can also contact Bonnie Anderson using the following sites:
Bonnie Anderson is the maintainer of the package "Cydia". Please contact them via email for any questions on this version of the package.
If you found a mistake in the depiction or cannot download the package, you can reach out to the maintainer of the "Bonnie's Repo" repo, Bonnie Anderson.
